CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.OBS_Last_Attempted_Call__c)), ISBLANK(Account__r.OBC_Last_Attempted_Call__c) ), Account__r.OBS_Last_Attempted_Call__c, IF( AND( ISBLANK(Account__r.OBS_Last_Attempted_Call__c), NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.OBC_Last_Attempted_Call__c)) ), Account__r.OBC_Last_Attempted_Call__c, IF( Account__r.OBS_Last_Attempted_Call__c > Account__r.OBC_Last_Attempted_Call__c, Account__r.OBS_Last_Attempted_Call__c, Account__r.OBC_Last_Attempted_Call__c ) ) )
CustomField.label: Last Onboarding Attempted Call
